forwardTo.label: Forward To
forwardTo.help: Optional downstream channel targets for agent output. Supported via runtime outbound: feishu, openclaw-weixin, qqbot, whatsapp, telegram, discord.

forwardTo.label: Forward To
forwardTo.help: Optional downstream channel targets for agent output.

enabled.description: Whether the Looki event channel is enabled.

baseUrl.description: Base URL for the Looki event API, without the /subscriptions/... suffix.

apiKey.description: Looki user API key (lk-..., created via POST /users/api_keys). Server resolves the subscription automatically.

accountId.description: OpenClaw account id used for this inbound event source.

pollTimeoutMs.description: Long-poll timeout in milliseconds. Server caps at 30000.

maxEvents.description: Max events to pull per poll.

forwardTo.description: Optional forward targets for agent output via runtime outbound (e.g. feishu, openclaw-weixin, qqbot, whatsapp, telegram, discord).
